resources.string: Failed to enter Picture-in-Picture mode, Please check if the permission is enabled.
invites you to a voice call
invites you to a video call
invites you to a group call
Redial is not supported for group calls
%s permission is not enabled. Unable to start audio/video calls.
Please go to "Settings > %s" to enable microphone permissions.
Please go to "Settings > %s" to enable camera permissions.
To ensure that you can connect to Bluetooth function for communication during Audio/Video Call, we need to request permission of nearby devices.

This feature requires audio-video call capability package support. To avoid affecting your usage, it is recommended to go to Tencent Cloud · Real-Time Communication Console to activate free trial or purchase official package
Your current package type does not support this feature. To unlock more capabilities, it is recommended to go to Tencent Cloud · Real-Time Communication Console to upgrade your package
The identifier is in blacklist. Failed to send this message!
Failed to initiate the call. Please check your login status and try again
You are currently in a call. Please end it before making a new one
The current status is waiting/accept, please do not call it repeatedly
The current scene does not support this function
This call supports a maximum of 9 participants
The other party hung up, call ended
The other party declined your call request
The other party did not answer. Please try again later
The other party is busy. Please try again later
The other party cancelled the call
User does not exist. Please verify if the user is registered or if invalid characters were entered
Camera is currently occupied by system call
Microphone is currently occupied by system call
You are currently in a call. Please end it before making a new one
This group already has an active call
